/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX13.3.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Beam.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Beam.dir/src/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Beam.dir/src/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Beam.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Beam.dir/src/Shader.cpp.o -o Beam  lib/glad/libglad.a lib/glfw-3.4/src/libglfw3.a lib/glm/glm/libglm.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
